steps.title: Set the function equal to zero
Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
Find two numbers that multiply to $-448$ and add to $-18$:
$$x^2-18x-448=(x-32)(x+14)$$

steps.title: Choose an intercept
steps.content: The zeros are $x=32$ and $x=-14$, so one x-intercept is $(-14,0)$. The answer is A.
